prerequisites: An active Drip account at getdrip.com.
Your personal Drip API Token, found in your Drip user settings at https://www.getdrip.com/user/edit.

authMethods.name: API Token (HTTP Basic Auth)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with your personal Drip API Token. The token is the username portion of the HTTP Basic Authentication scheme, with an empty password. This maps to the connector's required api_key secret field. Retrieve the token from your Drip user settings at https://www.getdrip.com/user/edit.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Drip API Token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Drip and open your user settings at https://www.getdrip.com/user/edit. Copy your personal API Token. Drip uses this token as the username in HTTP Basic Authentication with an empty password.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API Token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the API Token into the required api_key field. This is the connector's only credential. The connector authenticates to the Drip REST API using this token as the Basic Auth username with an empty password.

setupSteps.title: Be aware of Drip rate limits
setupSteps.body: Drip enforces a limit of 3,600 individual requests per hour on standard endpoints. Exceeding the limit returns HTTP 429. Plan sync frequency accordingly.
